race.comment: AGITA (7) gets a better set-up for this with a fast tempo assured. Warmed up late with a tidy first-up seventh over 1500m at this track. Effective at this level and comes to hand quickly. TENDERIZE (9) bounced back from the inside draw with a fighting neck second to the progressive Barrengarry over 1500m at this track. Beautifully placed and has solid top-three prospects. WRATHFUL (5) ready to peak fourth-up from the better gate. Closed strongly in the soft (7) going with a tough third over 1550m at Randwick Kensington in this class. Can race a little closer from the good barrier and tempo suits. AIX EN PROVENCE (4) getting better with age and caught the eye on his return with a handy fourth over 1350m at Wyong. Can get cover from the draw and stays in the calculations.
race.rail_position: 8m from 1000m to Winning post and 6m the remainder. (Pent: 5.55)
